meaning: n.[希神]墨尔波墨(悲剧女神)
examples: Adaptive introgression of mimicry loci is therefore a plausible explanation for parallel evolution of multiple mimetic patterns in the melpomene–silvaniform clade.
Geographic mosaics of multiple colour-pattern RACES, such as in Heliconius melpomene (Fig. 1), converge to similar mosaics in other species, and this led to the hypothesis of mimicry2.
